race.comment: CABARET QUEEN (9) was disappointing given her $2.60 SP fresh here, doing a bit wrong having shown good ability on debut before a break. Lane goes aboard, expect she can improve quickly into this, in what looks a winnable affair. REGINA DEI RE (6) ran well fresh at Yarra Valley over 1000m should be better suited on the bigger track here having shown ability last time in work. SPIRIT OF GAIA (7) is going okay, beaten under a length in a messy finish here last time. She draws wide but can figure with a bit of luck early. CLIFFS HANGER (1) has been okay in two runs back, she should be at peak fitness and can give a sight.
